title: Connect without takeover preserves an incumbent owner

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A healthy incumbent device session owns the configured device and takeover is omitted.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Submit each tool-specific request with an unsupported_option field to its strict handler schema.
fault_script.expected_effect: Every tool rejects the complete request before handler, controller, adapter, or plane admission with zero downstream calls.

fault_script.action: For each tool-specific valid request, advance the fake monotonic clock past its deadline while its admission reservations are held.
fault_script.expected_effect: Every request returns not_sent before admission and releases its queue and request reservations.

fault_script.action: Clear the deterministic deadline injection while preserving the incumbent generation and the normalized request input.
fault_script.expected_effect: The next call with the same request identifier and normalized input reaches ordinary ownership admission rather than an in-flight or idempotency branch.

fault_script.action: Keep the incumbent generation active while a valid request omits takeover.
fault_script.expected_effect: The connect reports CONTROL_BUSY without changing the incumbent generation.

steps.expect: Strict schema rejection before controller admission with zero controller and plane calls.
not_sent with the queue slot and request-id reservation released for a subsequent request.
CONTROL_BUSY from ordinary ownership admission, proving the expired queue slot and request-id reservation were released.
CONTROL_BUSY with the incumbent generation unchanged.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_display_capture before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_display_status before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_keyboard before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_mouse before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_paste before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_input_release before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_power_control before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_connect before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_reconnect before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
Strict schema rejection for jetkvm_session_status before its handler, controller, adapter, or plane call, with zero downstream calls.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_capture before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_display_status before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_keyboard before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_mouse before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_paste before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_input_release before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_power_control before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_connect before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_reconnect before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
not_sent for jetkvm_session_status before admission with zero downstream calls and the queue and request reservation released.
CONTROL_BUSY with the incumbent generation unchanged when reconnect omits takeover.

pass.assertion: Schema-invalid input is rejected before controller admission and records zero controller and plane calls.

The expired response is not_sent; after the fault is cleared, the same request identifier and normalized input reaches normal CONTROL_BUSY handling, proving every queue and request reservation was released.
A connect without takeover returns CONTROL_BUSY and leaves the incumbent generation unchanged.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
